# link11waap_user (Resource)

Manages a User account in Link11 WAAP.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "link11waap_user" "engineer" {
  acl          = 5
  contact_name = "Jane Doe"
  email        = "jane.doe@example.com"
  mobile       = "+1234567890"
  org_id       = "my-org-id"
}

output "user_id" {
  value = link11waap_user.engineer.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `acl` (Number) Access control level (1-20).
- `contact_name` (String) Contact name for the user.
- `email` (String) Email address for the user.
- `mobile` (String) Mobile phone number for the user.
- `org_id` (String) Organization ID the user belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the user (generated by the API).
- `org_name` (String) Organization name.
